notes: Run 2026-06-26. Mechanics: Initials (5) + Before & After (5). Initials is a first-ever use — no prior wordplay pack has used this mechanic. Before & After last used in 2026-06-22. All 10 answers are fresh across every prior wordplay pack. Initials answers: Periodic Table (P.T.), Black Market (B.M.), Turing Test (T.T.), Manifest Destiny (M.D.), Habeas Corpus (H.C.). B&A answers: Cat Nap Time, Solar Power Plant, Water Polo Shirt, Milk Chocolate Box, Rock Bottom Line.
